subject: Veteran-Owned Consulting - annual 1099 declaration reminder
body_preview: Annual reminder for veterans in retiree or independent consulting engagements: file the VA-1099 declaration by Dec 15. This is a VA administrative notice only; no action if you are not filing this year.

subject: VA veteran-owned-business questionnaire 2026 - respond within two weeks
body_preview: Annual VA questionnaire for veterans with any 1099 consulting income. Response window: two weeks. Automatic reminder, no action if no 1099 income for calendar year.

subject: Veterans compliance review 2026 - engagement disclosure form
body_preview: Reminder to disclose any post-retirement consulting engagements on the annual VA compliance form. Filing is optional; this is a records-only notice.

subject: Flu shot walk-in clinic - Cortez Nov 5
body_preview: VA flu shot walk-in Nov 5 at the Cortez community center. No appointment needed. Bring VA card.

subject: Annual VA benefits review - please respond by Dec 15
body_preview: Annual open-enrollment review window. Confirm elections or take no action to auto-rollover for FY 2027.
